title: delissea spathulata
intro: Delissea spathulata, also known as Hawaiian heath or mountain heath, is a flowering plant species native to the Hawaiian Islands. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Delissea spathulata are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Delissea spathulata often involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
